statement: In every magma, Equation 2151 (`x = ((y * y) * z) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 1389 (`x = y * (((z * z) * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0526
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) z) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z z) y) z))
